text_block_list.text:
With the Japan Dirt Derby behind her, Smart
Falcon focuses her attention on summer camp.
Her passion is extraordinary.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Th-that's fifty... sets of sprints... done!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... It's okay! I can... keep going!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There are going to be older students racing at the
JBC Classic coming up!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That means I have to get even stronger during
summer camp! So, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I can keep going! Make me into a top Umadol!

She's been overexerting herself, though. I need
something she can enjoy without putting too
much stress on her body...
choice_data_list:
Let's build that core with a dance lesson on the
beach!

Exercise self-control! Let's have a dance lesson
back in the lodge!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
A dance lesson! Like special Umadol training,
right?
choice_data_list: Let's dance on the sand and improve your core.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's dance!

Smart Falcon dances her heart out on the sand,
her intense concentration captivating all those
who lay eyes upon her, until...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aahhhh...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My... my legs are spent... I don't think I can move
them another inch...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hold on, Trainer! I'm okay!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can stop now... I can't allow my
feet to fail me now...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Get up, feet! Get up! And then...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Soar! Soar like a swan!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...W-was I flying just now?!
choice_data_list: ...You'll be the next prima ballerina, Falco!
...You'll be the next prima ballerina, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: What are they doing? Some kind of musical?

We may have gotten carried away, but in the end,
Smart Falcon still enjoys a fun training session.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
A dance lesson! Like special Umadol training,
right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But what do you mean by "self-control"?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Trainer! You're such a meanie!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Why, you! You can't just have ramen right in front
of my face like this!
choice_data_list: Ahhh, nothing beats the rich flavor of seafood!
Ahhh, nothing beats the rich flavor of seafood!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Gulp! I-I want some too! Just a bite...
choice_data_list: Once you've done a whole concert's worth of dancing. Slurp, slurp...
Once you've done a whole concert's worth of dancing. Slurp, slurp...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Uggghhh! You're a monster!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
What's going on over there? Some kind of new
game?

...After Smart Falcon manages to finish a concert's
worth of dancing, I treat her to a bowl of special
seafood ramen topped with clams.
